heading: This Afternoon
text: More sun north, mixing with more clouds south. Chance of a passing shower along the Massachusetts border. Seasonably warm, and less humid. Highs in the 80s. Light and variable wind.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy north, mostly cloudy south. A chance of rain showers far south. Lows from the upper 50s to near 60. Calm wind.

heading: Monday
text: A few pockets of sun north, mostly cloudy south. Highs in the 80s north, a few 70s south. Calm wind turning southeast.
